title: Number of Ways to Arrive at Destination

testcases.input: n = 7, roads = [[0,6,7],[0,1,2],[1,2,3],[1,3,3],[6,3,3],[3,5,1],[6,5,1],[2,5,1],[0,4,5],[4,6,2]] Output: 4 Explanation: The shortest amount of time it takes to go from intersection 0 to intersection 6 is 7 minutes. The four ways to get there in 7 minutes are: - 0 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 4 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 1 ➝ 2 ➝ 5 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 1 ➝ 3 ➝ 5 ➝ 6
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The shortest amount of time it takes to go from intersection 0 to intersection 6 is 7 minutes. The four ways to get there in 7 minutes are: - 0 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 4 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 1 ➝ 2 ➝ 5 ➝ 6 - 0 ➝ 1 ➝ 3 ➝ 5 ➝ 6

testcases.input: n = 2, roads = [[1,0,10]] Output: 1 Explanation: There is only one way to go from intersection 0 to intersection 1, and it takes 10 minutes.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is only one way to go from intersection 0 to intersection 1, and it takes 10 minutes.
